tasks.label: setup random test
tasks.command: Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'gen.cpp'; Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'ans.cpp'; code gen.cpp ans.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (compare tokens)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/run_random_test.ps1 checker/compare_tokens.cpp ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp 5000 10000

tasks.label: run random test (max error 1e-6)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/run_random_test.ps1 checker/max_error_1e-6.cpp ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp 5000 10000

tasks.label: run random test (max error 1e-9)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/run_random_test.ps1 checker/max_error_1e-9.cpp ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp 5000 10000

tasks.label: run random test (custom judge)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/run_random_test_custom_judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp judge.cpp 5000 10000
